Ukulalela i-HiFi usebenzisa i-Bluetooth kukuvumela ukuthi ujabulele ikhwalithi ephezulu yomsindo kunaleyo etholakala ku-Spotify Ekhokhelwayo kuphela. I-HiFi ijatshulelwa kangcono ngezipikha zokuXhuma ku-Spotify ze-[HiFi] kanye/noma amadivayisi anezintambo.
